theme.archetype: Archetype 7 (Electric & Neon) grounded in Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast)
theme.description: A god-tier developer portfolio blending the raw, technical aesthetic of a terminal with the premium, high-contrast layouts of top-tier SaaS companies. No generic purple/teal gradients. It relies on stark blacks, precise grid systems, and a singular, aggressive 'High-Vis Lime' accent to signal command-line mastery and performance.

typography.instructions: Use Outfit for massive impact headings. Use JetBrains Mono for all body text, navigational elements, and statistics to reinforce the 'developer' identity. Never center headings; maintain a strict left-aligned brutalist hierarchy.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_system: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use p-8 or p-12 for bento grid cards. Gap between major sections must be py-32.
layout_and_spacing.grid_protocol: MODE A: The 'Tetris' Grid for skills and platform stats (LeetCode, CodeChef, GitHub). Create aggressive asymmetry. Mix tall rectangles (col-span-1 row-span-2) with wide blocks (col-span-2 row-span-1).

surface_strategy.cards: Flat solid surfaces (bg-[#0A0A0A]) with a sharp 1px solid border (border-[#1F1F1F]). No soft drop shadows. Use inner borders or 'Retro-Futurism' terminal styling (e.g., lime green hover states).
surface_strategy.glassmorphism: Used ONLY for the floating sticky navigation: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 with a bottom border of border-white/10.
surface_strategy.hero_overlay: Gradient overlay from bottom to top to blend background into solid #030303.

hero.style: Massive typography. Left aligned. Typing animation using JetBrains Mono with a blinking cursor (border-r-2 border-[#CCFF00]). Background should have a subtle dark geometric texture or a CSS grid with fading radial gradient at the mouse position.

stats_dashboard.style: Bento grid for LeetCode, CodeChef, and GitHub stats. Use the 'Tracing Beam' effect on the card borders for hover states. Data must be live-fetched where possible, showing hard metrics (Problems Solved, Stars, Rating) in giant numbers using Outfit font.

projects.style: Interactive cards with a raw technical feel. Image/mockup on top, monospace tags for tech stack below. On hover, image scales up slightly and border turns #CCFF00.

skills.style: Avoid generic pill tags. Use a dense 'Control Room' grid (Mode B) with progress bars that animate from 0% to X% on scroll, filled with High-Vis Lime.

timeline.style: Experience and Education displayed as a vertical Git commit tree. Nodes are hollow circles that fill with Lime when scrolled into view.

forms.style: Use customized Shadcn UI forms. Inputs must have square corners (rounded-none or max rounded-sm), bg-[#0A0A0A], border-[#1F1F1F], and focus-visible:ring-[#CCFF00].

micro_interactions.hover: Text color shifts to #CCFF00. Subtle -translate-y-1 on cards. 1px solid border transition.
micro_interactions.scroll: Lime green scroll progress indicator fixed at the top of the viewport (h-1 bg-[#CCFF00]). Fade-up on scroll for all major sections using Framer Motion.

hero_background.description: Deep black geometric texture to be used at low opacity (10-20%) behind the hero section.

icons.instructions: Use react-icons/fi for interface icons, react-icons/si for tech stacks (SiLeetcode, SiCodechef, SiGithub, SiReact, etc.).

testing_requirements.data_testid: ALL interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs, nav items) MUST include a kebab-case data-testid attribute based on their role (e.g., data-testid='contact-submit-button', data-testid='nav-about-link').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: framer-motion, react-icons, clsx, tailwind-merge.
Add 'Outfit' and 'JetBrains Mono' via Google Fonts in index.html.
Setup Tailwind config with the specified colors and extended spacing/grid.
Build the application completely custom using HTML/Tailwind for layouts, and Shadcn UI ONLY for the Contact Form and complex interactive bits.
Implement the live data fetching proxy as requested in the problem statement for GitHub/LeetCode/CodeChef.
Ensure dark mode is the default and only mode if toggle is not explicitly requested, or build a toggle but optimize heavily for dark.
